title: Chopper Hides His Voice
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on chopper hides his voice, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Hides His Voice. Hiriluk reaches out to Chopper and gives him a place to belong, while Drum Kingdom’s cruelty remains in the background. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: psh, that annoying talk again?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Just have a drink, will ya?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Chief magistrate of drum kingdom KUROMARIMO

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: chief staff officer of drum kingdom CHESS

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That's just how "kingdoms" are, my friend dalton.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: King Wapol's methods of rule just happens to differ a little from our former King, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Nonetheless, the people are nothing without a king. Just imagine how they'd fare alone.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Like rabbits pushed out into the cruel jungle, they'll be picked off one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Our majesty might be strict, but that's only to maintain peace and order of these lands.

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: That's right! Now let's all have a glass or two!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Just a different method of rule, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...When I escorted our majesty to the recent Reverie,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I happened to come across a certain little girl.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Holy Land Marie- Joe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DRAGON THE REVELU- TIONARY...

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: This man's ideology is a clear and present threat...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: I'm certain he'll become a very dangerous figure for the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Within 5-6 years,

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: PFFT, RIDICULOUS... that doesn't concern my kingdom one bit.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: If you want to catch him, then handle it amongst yourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: King of Drum Wapol

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Just don't make any trouble for my kingdom, got it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Enough, Wapol! Does your selfish- mess know no bounds!?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Just what do you take this "reverie" to be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: King of Alabasta Nefertari cobra

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gahh!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Nghhh... Nefertari cobra...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmph, that meeting left a bad taste in my mouth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hm? She must be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oops! Looks like my hand slipped!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Y-Your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! Why, is that the princess of Alabasta?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My, my, isn't she as pitiful as her father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Princess VIVI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare you!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: IGARAM, STOP!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I'm fine.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Please excuse me for carelessly bumping into you, sir.

summary: This part highlights chopper hides his voice and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
